usage: addAIORow [-help] [-abutRow] [-cluster_halo <space>] [-dx <x_dist>] [-dy <y_dist>] [-esd <esites_no...>] [-noSnap] [-num <integer>] [-orient {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MX90 MY MY90}] [-rowName <name>] [-shoulder <site_no...>] -site <siteName> [-soft] {-bump <bumpId> | -loc llx lly} [-H  | -V ] [-pitchX <dist> -ptnArrX <integer>] [-pitchY <dist> -ptnArrY <integer>]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -H
options.description: to create horizontal rows.

options.name: -V
options.description: to create vertical rows.

options.name: -abutRow
options.description: to create two abut rows.

options.name: -bump
options.description: specifies the bump Id

options.name: -cluster_halo
options.description: specifies the size of halo around the boundary of a row cluster

options.name: -dx
options.description: offsets the reference point to the first I/O row in x

options.name: -dy
options.description: offsets the reference point to the first I/O row in y

options.name: -esd
options.description: reserves the sites in a row as esd cells

options.name: -loc
options.description: specifies the lower left x and y coordinate reference points of the new I/O row

options.name: -noSnap
options.description: not snap the row to the standard cell placement grid

options.name: -num
options.description: specifies the number of sites

options.name: -orient
options.description: {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MX90 MY MY90} specifies the orientation for the row

options.name: -pitchX
options.description: specifies the distance between I/O row in x

options.name: -pitchY
options.description: specifies the distance between I/O row in y

options.name: -ptnArrX
options.description: specifies the x dimensions of the row cluster array size

options.name: -ptnArrY
options.description: specifies the y dimensions of the row cluster array size

options.name: -rowName
options.description: specifies the name or prefix of the area I/O row

options.name: -shoulder
options.description: reserves the sites in a row as shoulder cells

options.name: -site
options.description: specifies the site name for the area I/O row

options.name: -soft
options.description: to create soft I/O rows cluster
